rationale: verification_command: go test ./... && lefthook run pre-commit
reason: The requested fuzzy model-constraint contract is already present in docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-003-fizeau-service.md, the service already resolves raw ServiceExecuteRequest.Model and RouteRequest.Model through shared model matching in service_model_resolution.go, and the focused routing/model tests already cover separator normalization, alias tolerance, ambiguity, no-match evidence, and Execute/ResolveRoute parity. The only blocker on the first full-suite run was an uninitialized recorded benchmark submodule; after initializing scripts/benchmark/external/terminal-bench-2 at the pinned commit, go test ./... and lefthook run pre-commit both pass without any source changes.

verification_command passed: go test ./... -run "Test.*(Model.*Fuzzy|Model.*Alias|NormalizeModel|ResolveExecuteRoute|ResolveRoute).*" && lefthook run pre-commit && go test ./...
rationale: status: satisfied_by_existing_code
reason: The requested CONTRACT-003 model-resolution semantics are already implemented and covered by tests in the current tree; no code change was required.
evidence:
- docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-003-fizeau-service.md:444-456 describes Fizeau-owned raw Model resolution, separator normalization, ambiguity handling, and no-match evidence.
- internal/modelmatch/modelmatch.go implements the shared normalization primitive used by service routing and OpenAI-compatible discovery.
- internal/provider/openai/discovery_test.go covers qwen36, qwen/qwen3.6, QWEN3.6, ambiguity, and no-match cases.
- service_routing_errors_test.go and service_http_provider_test.go cover service-level Execute/ResolveRoute parity and typed no-match behavior.
